synopsis:
With a big head and three hairs on top, Sanmao, a child from an ordinary family, originally had a happy childhood, but the war made him a helpless orphan. A child without parents can even bully yellow dogs and crows. In times of crisis, he was rescued by a kind-hearted old fisherman and experienced a long-lost but short-lived happiness. The good times didn't last long, the bullies stole the fruits of their labor, and the bandit soldiers brutally shot the old man to death.  What will be waiting for him... The film is adapted from the comic book of the same name by the famous cartoonist Zhang Leping.

(Source: v.qq)

missingSources: episodes (no data from Zenshin or Jikan)
